macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Canadian Employment Data Meets Expectations, Fuels Hawkish BoC Bets Amid Oil Price Drop
items.summary: Canadian jobs added 14.1K (vs 15K expected), with unemployment falling to 6.7%, supporting hawkish Bank of Canada outlook despite inconsistent trends. WTI plunged 15% on US-Iran ceasefire news, pressuring CAD but preserving medium-term strength as oil exporter.

items.title: US-Iran Ceasefire Sparks 15% WTI Crude Plunge, Easing War Premium but Strait of Hormuz Tensions Linger
items.summary: A feeble US-Iran ceasefire removed a 15% premium from WTI prices, weakening CAD short-term but highlighting Canada's oil export advantages amid ongoing Hormuz uncertainties. Markets await negotiation clarity on global oil flows.

items.title: Scotiabank Warns of Oil Shock's Disproportionate Hit to Low-Income Canadian Households
items.summary: A sustained $10/bbl WTI rise could add $1B in annual food/energy costs for Canada's lowest income quintiles, equating to $5B shock under current projections; targeted relief considered without altering macro outlook. Prime Minister Carney weighs consumer support options.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: UXLINK Surges 154% Leading Crypto Gainers
items.summary: UXLINK skyrocketed 154.64% to $0.0036 with $1.83M volume, topping gainers amid altcoin momentum. Other top performers include MDT (+74.81% to $0.0115), DATA (+58.82%), CHILLGUY (+21.36%), and NAP (+19.09%).

items.title: Bitcoin Hovers Near $72K Amid Fragile US-Iran Truce
items.summary: Bitcoin traded up 1% at $71,696 over the past 24 hours, reaching near $72,000 after a weekly 8% gain fueled by Middle East de-escalation and $56M in bearish liquidations. Traders remain cautious on ceasefire stability.

items.title: Bitcoin Tops $72,000 on $300M Short Squeeze
items.summary: Bitcoin surpassed $72,000 amid Middle East de-escalation, with over $300 million in liquidations across 24 hours signaling bullish momentum from short squeezes.

items.title: Binance Update: BTC Trades Between $70.5K-$73.1K
items.summary: Bitcoin fluctuated between $70,523 and $73,145 in the past 24 hours, currently at $71,765 up 0.68% as of 09:30 UTC.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Anthropic Releases Claude Mythos (Project Glasswing)
items.summary: Anthropic has launched Claude Mythos, also known as Project Glasswing, described as the biggest AI update in 2026, revolutionizing prompting techniques and making older methods obsolete for AI projects.

items.title: TypeScript AI Demo Day Showcases Production AI Applications
items.summary: Teams presented real-world AI applications built in TypeScript during the TypeScript AI Demo Day in San Francisco on April 9, 2026, sharing lessons from running AI systems in production.

items.title: Covenant AI Exits Bittensor Subnets Templar, Basilica, and Grail
items.summary: Covenant AI, led by Samuel, has exited Bittensor subnets 3 (Templar), 39 (Basilica), and 81 (Grail), discussed in a recent community X Space with Const (Jacob Steves).

items.title: Google Explains State-of-the-Art AI Video Generation Architecture
items.summary: Google Developers released a video breaking down the complex architecture behind state-of-the-art AI video models, from prompt to output.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Windrose Pirate Survival Game Announces 2026 Release Date
items.summary: The upcoming survival game Windrose, a pirate-themed title, has revealed its release date for this year, generating significant hype with over a million wishlists. It was highlighted alongside other survival game updates like Enshrouded and new Don't Starve content at the Triple-I Initiative Showcase.

items.title: Naughty Dog Canceled The Last of Us Online 24 Hours Before Reveal
items.summary: After 7 years of development, Naughty Dog canceled The Last of Us Online multiplayer mode when it was nearly 80% complete, just one day before its planned public announcement. The game director described the decision as soul-crushing for the team.

items.title: Roblox Game 'Project Power' Stolen from Original Developers
items.summary: Popular Roblox game Project Power, inspired by Invincible, has been stolen from its original developers who are no longer earning revenue from it. A creator urges players to boycott the hijacked version amid ongoing drama.

items.title: Rumors Swirl of Unannounced Nintendo Games Including Zelda Remake and Star Fox
items.summary: Recent leaks point to potential unannounced 2026 titles from Nintendo like a Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake and new Star Fox game. State of a K3 is slated for a community alpha playtest next month, likely delaying its full release.

items.title: Frostrail Zombie Train Survival Game Revealed at Triple-I Showcase
items.summary: New co-op survival game Frostrail, where players control a train to escape zombie hordes while gathering resources, was unveiled and has already surpassed one million wishlists.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Intel Secures Multiyear Deal with Google for Xeon Processors and IPUs in Data Centers
items.summary: Intel announced that Google has committed to using future generations of Xeon processors and customized infrastructure processing units for networking, security, and storage. The agreement supports Intel's push into data center spending, boosting its stock by up to 3.6%.

items.title: Vibhor Jain Appointed CEO of ONDC
items.summary: Vibhor Jain was named Managing Director and CEO of the government-backed open ecommerce network ONDC, effective April 7, following his role as acting CEO. The appointment coincides with a revenue surge and new leadership additions aimed at benefiting farmers, artisans, and small businesses.

items.title: TCS Reports Strong Q4 FY26 Results with 12% Profit Jump
items.summary: Tata Consultancy Services posted a 12% year-over-year profit increase to Rs 13,718 crore and 10% revenue growth, driven by mega deals amid rising AI demand. Attrition rose to 13.7%, with 2,356 employees added during the quarter.
